home.subtitle: Manage counterpart hours and reports from one place.

Background.title: Background Colors
Background.description: Background colors are used to set the backdrop for various UI elements. They help create visual hierarchy and improve readability.

Typography.title: Typography
Typography.description: Our typography system is designed to provide clear and consistent text styles across the application. Below are the different text styles available for use.

Spacing.title: Spacing Scale
Spacing.description: Use the spacing tokens to keep vertical rhythm, card padding, and control density consistent across screens.
Spacing.cardDescription: Default large container padding should use space-5.
Spacing.stackComfortableBody: Use larger gaps between separate content groups or sections.

Colors.title: Color Palette
Colors.description: Our color palette consists of primary, secondary, and neutral colors that can be used to create a cohesive and visually appealing interface.

Semantics.title: Usage Rules
Semantics.description: These semantic rules keep screens consistent even when different components are built by different people.

surfaces.title: Surface hierarchy
surfaces.page: Use surface-1 for page background zones.
surfaces.card: Use surface-2 for primary cards and panels.
surfaces.inset: Use surface-3 for nested cards, filters, and embedded groups.

feedback.title: Feedback colors
feedback.brand: Brand is for primary actions and selected states.
feedback.success: Success confirms completed or healthy states.
feedback.warning: Warning signals caution, but not failure.
feedback.danger: Danger is reserved for destructive actions and errors.

Radii.title: Border Radius
Radii.description: Border radius values are used to create rounded corners on UI elements, enhancing the visual appeal and user experience.

States.title: Interactive States
States.description: Inputs and actions need consistent hover, focus, selected, disabled, and error behavior. These examples should drive component implementation.
States.successMessage: Saved successfully. This confirms a completed action.
States.infoMessage: Informational notices should not compete with errors.
States.warningMessage: Warnings indicate caution before a risky step.
States.dangerMessage: Errors and destructive confirmations should use danger.

Shadows.title: Box Shadows
Shadows.description: Box shadows are used to create depth and hierarchy in the UI by adding shadows to elements, making them stand out against the background.

CardExample.title: Card Example
CardExample.description: This is an example of a card that uses the background colors, typography, borders, and shadows defined in our design system.
